title: Vibração na Borda - Edge Vibration
problem: Seleçao errada de anéis -> diâmetro de suporte da liga de alloy muito pequeno
resolution: abra um chamado para analise do ticket

title: Ponto no centro - Center dot
diagnostics: Fine cut tool worn R2 or R5 1800-2000 lenses
Wrong position of the spray nozzle
Coolant temperature different between calibration and generation
resolution: Replace with new or re-sharp one
Requires machine supplier intervention or maintenance
Replace with new or re-sharp one
